examples: He faced the enemy valiantly, shuned no difficulties and dangers and would not hesitate to lay down his life if need be.
He suffered further heart attacks and strokes, all of which he fought valiantly.
They even added, valiantly but surely vainly, that Greece might never need the loans.
The attorney-general hung in valiantly, even going to Europe to do some snooping among foreign banks.
Their actions held true to the SEAL Creed and they all fought valiantly to the end.
